customer_vision: Margie's CEO wants Copilot to help consultants book 20% more travel per day without adding headcount. Very clear ROI metric.
business_objectives: 3,500 consultants active on Copilot within 60 days of go-live
success_criteria: Productivity measurement dashboard live by Day 30 post go-live
risks: Microsoft 365 licensing not fully compliant — some users on E1 (not eligible for Copilot)
pitfalls: Client's IT team is 2 people — limited bandwidth for tenant configuration support
key_decisions: Custom travel planning prompt library as differentiator — Copilot Studio for custom agents
delivery_notes: License remediation must happen before deployment. IT team bandwidth is the constraint — give them a very detailed pre-work checklist.
